macaroni-au-gratin-with-bechamel-argiro.name: Macaroni Au Gratin With Béchamel
instructions: Boil the pasta in salted moiling water for 2’ less than the package.
Drain the pasta and add a little butter.
Mix and add them to the cream along with the ham and the grated mozzarella.
Mix all the actors with the cream and add them to a buttered bowl of refractory 22×30 or a small pan buttoned.
Sprinkle the spaghetti with milk with cheese and bread crust.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180oC, in the air, in the medium grill until the ogratin is browned and crusted for about 20’.
Serve it warm as it comes out of the oven while the cheeses are still melting and the cream preserves its moisture.

mackerel-pantry-pasta.name: Mackerel Pantry Pasta

ingredients.item: -oz. cans boneless mackerel in olive oil or other high-quality tinned fish (such as sardines or tuna in olive oil)
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place mackerel, garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, capers, 3 Tbsp. oil, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large heatproof bowl. Season generously with pepper and toss to combine.

Set bowl over a large pot of generously salted water (bottom of bowl should not be touching water) and bring water to a boil. Carefully remove bowl from pot and set aside. (Gently warming the ingredients here allows them to mingle nicely with the hot pasta later.)

Cook pasta in same pot of boiling water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Using tongs, transfer pasta, along with any water clinging to strands, to bowl with mackerel mixture. Add Parmesan, red pepper flakes, and ¼ cup pasta cooking liquid to bowl and toss pasta with tongs, adding more pasta cooking liquid by the tablespoonful if needed, until cheese is melted and pasta is coated evenly in sauce, about 1 minute.
Divide pasta among bowls. Top with parsley, drizzle some oil over, and season with more pepper. Serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over if desired.

mahi-mahi-with-fennel-olives-and-orange.name: Mahi-mahi With Fennel, Olives, And Orange

ingredients.item: Leftover mahi-mahi from mahi-mahi with smashed white beans and sage

instructions: Toss orange supremes, fennel, and olives with lettuce. Top with mahi-mahi and drizzle with olive oil.

maja-blanca.name: Maja Blanca
instructions: To make the latik: Bring coconut milk to a boil in a large nonstick skillet over high heat. Continue to boil, stirring occasionally, until oil begins to separate from the milk, about 5 minutes.

Reduce heat to medium. Continue to cook, scraping the bottom of the skillet regularly with a heatproof spatula until only golden brown residue and oil is left, about 15 minutes. It will look a bit like ground meat, this is normal.

Strain mixture to separate coconut solids from the oil. The coconut solids are the latik and will be served with the pudding. Reserve the oil for another use. Cover and chill the latik until serving time.
Line an 8-inch square baking pan with parchment paper, extending the paper up two sides of the pan. Set aside.
To make the pudding: Whisk sugar and cornstarch together in a medium saucepan.

Stir in coconut cream, cream-style corn, and corn kernels, if using. Bring to a boil over high heat, stirring constantly, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium. Continue to cook and stir until mixture is thick and bubbly, 2 minutes.
Pour corn mixture into the prepared pan. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, at least 2 hours or up to 24 hours before serving.
Invert pudding carefully onto a serving plate. Remove parchment and discard. Cut into 12 slices. Remove latik from the refrigerator. Chop finely, if desired. Sprinkle latik over each slice.

make-a-delicious-philly-cheese-steak-bur.name: Make A Delicious Philly Cheese Steak Burrito
make-a-delicious-philly-cheese-steak-bur.original_name: Haz un rico burrito Philly Cheese Steak

ingredients.item: 4  rebanadas de queso  (provolone o queso americano)

instructions: In a big frying pan, heats 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and peppers and spray for 5-7 minutes until tender and slightly caramelized. Remove the vegetables from the frying pan and reserve.

In the same frying pan, add the rest of the oil and increase fire to medium-high. Cooking of beef cuts with salt, pepper, powder garlic and Spanish sauce (if used). Cooking for 4-5 minutes, or till meat's golden but juicy.

Warm the flour tortillas into a frying pan or microwave to make them more flexible. On every omelette, place a slice of provolone cheese or some cheesebatch. Add a portion of meat and some mix of onions and peppers. If you prefer, you can add a cape of mayonnaise to give more creaminess.
Fold the tortilla ends to the centre, and then roll from one side to form the burrit, making sure that the ingredients are well wrapped.
For a crispy texture, purify burritos in a hot frying pan from both sides for about 3 minutes.

make-ahead-french-toast-casserole-is-the.name: Make-ahead French Toast Casserole Is The Christmas Morning Treat

ingredients.item: Loaf (about 14 ounces) challah or brioche bread

instructions: Spread the pieces of bread in a single layer on a large rimmed baking sheet and bake until crispy and golden, about 25 minutes. Transfer the bread to a 9x13-inch baking dish and scatter evenly with the frozen cherries.

In a large bowl, whisk the eggs until they look homogenous. Add the half and half, Nutella, sugar, and salt and whisk until well combined. Pour the mixture evenly over the bread and cherries. Using a spatula, press any dry pieces of bread into the custard to saturate them; they will not stay submerged.
Wrap the baking dish in plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
Remove the bread pudding from the refrigerator and set aside to remove the chill, about 30 minutes. Remove the plastic wrap.
Bake the bread pudding until the custard has just set and pressing the center of the pudding with your finger does not reveal runny liquid, 55 to 70 minutes.

Transfer to a wire rack and cool until the pudding is set, about 30 minutes. Sprinkle with hazelnuts and serve with whipped cream, if using. Leftovers can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days. Reheat individual portions in the microwave in 30-second intervals until warmed through, 1 to 2 minutes. Love the recipe? Leave us stars and a comment below!

mamadist-ice-cream-with-caramelized-bana.name: Mamadist Ice Cream With Caramelized Banana

ingredients.item: 1 carton of herbal whipped cream in a box (ermol or morfat)
1 carton of herbal whipped cream in a box (ermol or morfat)

instructions: Add the bananas cut into slices first.
Add the butter and black sugar.
Mix and bake for 10 minutes at 200
Allow them to cool and melt with a fork.

manchego-gazpacho-step-by-step-comedera.name: Manchego Gazpacho Step By Step
instructions: Let's start our recipe, place a hot pan with some oil. We'll wash the rabbit and chicken and we'll seal them up. We'll also add two garlic teeth.

We'll let our meat seal and get that characteristic golden color. When you look at it this way, you'll add some water and a bay and cover. Let's cook for 30 minutes on medium heat till the meats get soft.
While we cook our meat, we will cut our onion and pimentons into small pieces.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and you'll add the onion to revamp. When clear, you'll add his pigments and mix them up till everything's perfectly united and we have a good frying.
Let's make a mojito in a mortar or processor with garlic, parsley and white wine. We have to get a little light.
We'll add a mojito with garlic and parsley and wine and let them cook for 5 minutes till the liquor evaporate a little.
Check your meat and check if they're soft or tender. If so, turn off and reserve. Otherwise, get them to finish cooking.
Add tomato sauce, pepper, salt and paprika to frying and mix well. Let them cook for another 5 minutes till everything's built up.
You'll have your flesh once cold and tender and we'll get rid of it till we have them with strands. Don't put up your broth and get them and put them back up.

We'll add the meat to the frying and mix well. We'll add some cauldron till it's covered, and you'll stir and let them cook with medium heat so that the meat will have every flavour and reduce its cauldron.

When you see that the liquid is reduced and with stew texture, you will add tortillas and with wrapped movements you will mix them so that they do not get rid and become impregnated from the juices. Cooking for 3 minutes.
We will put out, let them rest and serve on a mud pint to make them more vivid and traditional.
Degusta!

mandarin-macaroons-argiro.name: Mandarin Macaroons

ingredients.item: 1⁄4 cup Mandarin liqueur or orange or brandy
1⁄4 cup Mandarin liqueur or orange or brandy

instructions: First place the mandarin peels in the mixer (to the cutters) after washing them well and the almond and grinding them.
Place the sugar with the mandarin juice in a small pot until the sugar melts.
Add the ground ingredients (flies and almonds).
Mix with a wooden spoon until the mixture becomes a mass and removes from the pot.
Allow the mixture to cool well so that we can make it.
Take a spoonful of mixture in the hand and make it into a ball.
Each time we catch a new mixture, dip your hands into alcohol, on the one hand because the mixture sticks and on the other hand to flavor it.
Leave the almonds on a rack or on a tray with parchment paper until they dry and when you touch them with your finger they have no moisture, no glue. This could take a few hours.
Then wrap them in powder or crystalline white sugar.

mango-and-cucumber-salad.name: Mango And Cucumber Salad

ingredients.item: Scotch bonnet chile or habanero chile
ingredients.prep: thinly sliced crosswise, seeds removed if less heat is desired
halved lengthwise, seeds removed, thinly sliced crosswise

instructions: Toss shallot, garlic, chile, lime juice, and salt in a medium bowl. Add mangoes and cucumber and toss again. Cover; let sit at room temperature until shallot and cucumber are softened and juicy and flavors come together, 45–60 minutes.
To serve, add cilantro to chow and toss well; season generously with pepper.
Chow (without cilantro) can be made 3 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

manhattan-cocktail.name: Manhattan Cocktail

ingredients.item: Maraschino cherry or 1 wide strip of orange peel

instructions: {'step': '2. Combine 45g rye whiskey, 44ml sweet vermouth, and 2g Angostura bitters or orange bitters in a cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes.'}
{'step': '3. Stir gently to chill, about 30 seconds,'}
{'step': '4. Strain into a coupe or martini glass.'}
{'step': '5. Garnish with 1 maraschino cherry or twist 1 wide strip of orange peel over the glass to express its oils and drop the peel into the glass.'}

meat-recipe-in-its-juice-comedera.name: Meat Recipe In Its Juice
meat-recipe-in-its-juice-comedera.original_name: Receta de carne en su jugo
instructions: Keep all separate ingredients ready to start production.
In a deep bowl, add the soy sauce, lemon juice and pepper.
Agrega la carne y deja marinar por 20 minutos.
In a frying pan with medium heat, add the bacon and fry for 8 minutes or till crisp.
Luego retira para escurrir y reserva. En una olla a fuego medio, agrega el aceite y la carne. Cocina a fuego medio durante 8 minutos, que es cuando la carne ha liberado sus jugos.
Swallow the green sauce after the meat has released its juices, and then add 4 cups of water and chicken stock as well as ground pepper.
After first boiling, cover the pot and let cook with low heat for about 15 minutes or till the meat is well cooked.
Add the bacon and ½ onion to leave cooking for another 5 minutes. Then remove the onion.
Add the beans and serve with cuts of avocado, minced onion, lemon juice and crispy bacon.

mengen-rice-lezzet.name: Mengen Rice

ingredients.item: 1 bowl of canned mushroom or 500-600 g of kult mushroom

instructions: 1. Wash the Pirinci in warm and salty water after waiting for 1 hour.
2. Shake the lamb meat by adding 1 whole onion and 8-10 cups of cold water.
3. Remove and separate the water of boiled lamb meat.
4. The onion you eat finely chopped in a large teflon pot, stirring in butter for 5 minutes.
5. Etleri ilave edip 5 dakika daha kavurmaya devam edin.
6. Then add chopped mushrooms in the form of washed and bird meat.
7. Add 4 water cups hot meat water after roasting several minutes.
8. Add salt and pepper and cook the mouth on medium heat fire.
9. Take the rice water completely from the stove and rest for 1 hour.
10. Flip the rice in the pot to a large serving plate.
11. 11. Pour walnut on it and decorate it with thin chopped derelate.
12. Serve hot.

meringue-clouds-with-peach-curd.name: Meringue Clouds With Peach Curd
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Using a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment, beat egg whites on medium-high speed until frothy, about 1 minute. With the motor running, add ½ cup sugar, 1 Tbsp. at a time, and beat until medium peaks form, about 5 minutes. Continue to beat until stiff, glossy peaks form, 10–12 minutes.

Transfer meringue to pastry bag and cut off tip so opening is ¾" wide. Pipe four 3¼" rounds onto a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Bake meringues until dry, firm, and peel easily off of baking sheet, 90–105 minutes. Turn off oven and let cool in oven with door slightly ajar.
Meanwhile, pulse chopped peach in a food processor until smooth. Transfer peach purée to a small bowl.
Toss peach wedges with 1 Tbsp. sugar and 1 tsp. lime juice. Let sit, tossing occasionally, until peaches release their juices.

Bring a medium pot of water to a simmer. Whisk rum, egg yolks, and remaining ⅓ cup sugar and ¼ cup lime juice in a medium bowl. Place bowl over a pot of barely simmering water and cook, whisking constantly, until mixture is foamy and thickens slightly, 5–6 minutes. Whisk in butter a few pieces at a time, incorporating completely before adding more. Stir in peach purée and let cool slightly.
Strain through a fine-sieve into a small bowl. Press plastic wrap directly onto surface and chill until cold, at least 2 hours.
Gently break each meringue and divide among bowls. Spoon peach curd over and top with macerated peaches.
Do Ahead: Peach curd can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

mexican-green-pozole-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Green Pozole Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cda de tomillo  (en polvo o molido)

instructions: Calienta una cazuela con aceite vegetal.
Four the green sauce with salt and pepper and add parsley. Meg and cook for 4 minutes. Turn and put them out.
Warm pot with 8 cups of water and add early maize and onion.
It also incorporates half-head garlic, bay leaves, thyme and oregano. Mix and let cook till you release your first heifer. At that time, put the fire down and cook for 40 minutes.
After 40 minutes, remove the laurel leaves and add the leg cuts, green sauce, and salt to taste.
Mix and cook for 1 hour or till meat and maize are soft.
When I'm at that point, put out and let them stand.
To serve, remove the flesh and shattering. Roast with nopal, onion, lemon and corn toast.

mexican-pork-burritos.name: Mexican Pork Burritos
instructions: Place pork roast, onion, and garlic into a large pot. Sprinkle one package taco seasoning over top and add enough water to cover roast. Set over medium-high heat and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer until meat is tender and can be pulled apart with a fork, 2 to 3 hours. Check water level every 45 minutes, adding more as needed. Carefully transfer roast to a cutting board. Discard vegetables, but reserve about 1 cup cooking liquid.

Shred pork with a fork, discarding any excess fat. Place pork into a mixing bowl with refried beans, tomatoes, refried beans, chiles, and remaining taco seasoning. Mix until well combined, adding reserved cooking liquid if mixture is too dry.

Spread pork mixture evenly down the center of each tortilla, then sprinkle with Cheddar cheese. Fold the bottom and top edges of each tortilla over the filling, then roll from one side to form a burrito.

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Place two burritos into the hot oil with the seams facing down. Fry until golden, about 2 minutes. flip and repeat on the other side. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Continue to fry remaining burritos in batches of two.

mexican-strawberry-agua-fresca.name: Mexican Strawberry Agua Fresca
instructions: Mix together strawberries, sugar, and 1 cup cold water in a medium bowl. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for 4 hours.
Pour chilled strawberry mixture into a blender. Blend on high until smooth.
Pour through a wire mesh strainer set over a large bowl; discard pulp and seeds.
Stir remaining 7 cups cold water into strawberry juice until aqua de fresa is well combined.
Fill glasses with ice. Pour aqua de fresa over ice. Garnish each serving with lime wedges and mint leaves.

mexican-style-wind-fritters-step-by-step.name: Mexican Style Wind Fritters Step By Step
mexican-style-wind-fritters-step-by-step.original_name: Buñuelos de viento estilo mexicano paso a paso
instructions: In your food processor put milk with an egg, an orange frying, sugar, salt, baking powder and yolks. He processes for a few seconds and sees his flour be added by little.
Once the ingredients are incorporated, pass the dough to a bigger bowl and let stand for 3 hours.
After that time pour oil into a frying pan (enough to submer the dough).
With the help of a wind frying mold, sink into the mixture and put it into a frying pan with hot oil.
Remove the mold as soon as the dough takes off and let the mug cold till it gets a golden color.
Retira del aceite con cuidado y coloca sobre toallas de papel para quitar el exceso de aceite.
Sprinkle with sugar to taste. That's good.

mini-cast-iron-skillet-smores.name: Mini Cast Iron Skillet S'mores

ingredients.item: Milk chocolate candy bar (such as hershey's®)

instructions: Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Place 1 graham cracker square into each (4) mini cast-iron skillet; top each with 1 piece chocolate and ½ marshmallow.
Place skillets in the preheated oven; cook until marshmallows begin to brown, about 3 minutes.
Gently press marshmallows into chocolate with a spatula; serve.

mini-egg-cupcakes.name: Mini Egg Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 12 cupcake cups with paper liners. In a bowl, whisk together the flour and baking powder.

In a mixing bowl, beat the white sugar with 1/2 cup butter until thoroughly mixed, then beat in the eggs, one at a time, incorporating each egg before adding the next. Stir in 2 teaspoons of vanilla extract. Stir the flour mixture into the egg mixture, followed by the milk, mixing to make a smooth batter. Fill each lined cupcake cup about 2/3 full of batter, and push a frozen solid chocolate egg into the batter in the center of each cupcake so a tiny bit of the egg sticks out.
Bake cupcakes in the preheated oven until the tops are lightly browned and the cakes spring back when pushed with a finger, 20 to 25 minutes. Allow cupcakes to cool completely.

In a bowl, beat 1/2 cup of butter with confectioners' sugar and 1/2 teaspoon of vanilla extract; add 1 tablespoon of milk, a teaspoon at a time, until the frosting is smooth. Beat in your choice of food color to desired shade, and spread frosting on each cupcake. Top each cupcake with a candy-coated mini egg for decoration.

mint-devils-food-cupcakes.name: Mint Devil's Food Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly spray 12 muffin cups.
Heat butter and chocolate together in a small saucepan over low heat until melted, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; set aside to cool slightly, about 5 minutes.
Combine 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons flour, baking soda, and salt together in a small bowl.
Mix milk, vinegar, and peppermint extract together in another small bowl.

Beat sugar and eggs together in large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until pale, about 3 minutes. Add melted chocolate and beat well to combine. Pour in 1/2 cup boiling water and beat until batter is well-blended. Add flour mixture; beat on low speed until incorporated. Add milk mixture and blend well. Fill muffin cups 3/4-full with batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into a cupcake comes out clean, 25 to 30 minutes. Transfer cupcakes to wire rack and cool to room temperature, about 45 minutes.

Combine 2 tablespoons cold water and gelatin in a small saucepan over low heat. Stir constantly until gelatin dissolves, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly, but not until set, about 5 minutes.

Combine 1 cup plus 3 tablespoons heavy cream, 1/4 cup plus 2 teaspoons confectioners' sugar, vanilla extract, and green food coloring in a large bowl. Whip with an electric mixer on low speed until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Beat in dissolved gelatin slowly. Increase speed to high and beat until frosting is stiff, about 3 minutes.
Spread frosting over cooled cupcakes. Remove and discard cream filling from chocolate sandwich cookies; crush cookies. Scatter cookie crumbs over cupcakes.

miso-caramel-apple.name: Miso Caramel Apple
instructions: Preheat oven to 275°. Pulse pistachios and 1½ tsp. sugar in a food processor until nuts are the size of split peas. Add sesame seeds and 1 Tbsp. miso; continue to pulse until incorporated and no clumps of miso remain. Spread evenly on a rimmed baking sheet. Bake until lightly browned, 15–20 minutes; let cool.
Meanwhile, insert ice-pop sticks into top of each apple, then push into center of apple. Spray a large plate or small baking sheet with nonstick spray.

Bring corn syrup, 1 cup sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a medium saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Continue to boil, brushing down sides of pan with a damp pastry brush and swirling pan occasionally (do not stir), until caramel is light amber, 5–7 minutes.

Carefully add cream and salt and whisk to combine; caramel will bubble up vigorously and may seize, but will become smooth again after whisking. Transfer to a medium bowl. Working quickly, whisk remaining 1 Tbsp. miso into caramel. Tilt bowl so caramel pools on 1 side. Coat sides and bottom of each apple with sauce, letting excess drip back into bowl. Roll base of apples in pistachio mixture, then transfer to prepared plate. Let cool 30 minutes.
Do Ahead: Apples can be assembled 1 day ahead; cover loosely with plastic wrap and chill. Let come to room temperature before serving.

miso-marinated-salmon.name: Miso Marinated Salmon
instructions: In a small bowl, combine miso, sugar, sake and mirin.
In a shallow container, combine the marinade and salmon. Marinate at least 30 minutes in the fridge.

Heat the pan over medium low heat. place a parchment paper in a pan. Place salmon on top of the parchment paper so salmon doesn’t burn. Cook 6-7 minutes both side or salmon gets the nice grill mark and color becomes opaque.
Enjoy!

moist-banana-muffins.name: Moist Banana Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin or line cups with paper liners.

Whisk flour, sugar, baking soda, and baking powder together in a bowl. Stir in bananas, mayonnaise, and chocolate chips until well combined. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and tops spring back when lightly pressed, about 20 minutes.

mojo-sauce.name: Mojo Sauce

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Blend orange juice, lime juice, chile, garlic, cilantro, oil, sugar, and salt in a blender until mostly smooth but still specked with herbs. Transfer sauce to a small bowl.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

monkfish-rice-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Monkfish Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 small can of tomato in pieces
1 small can of tomato in pieces

instructions: Season the fish with salt and lemon juice. Remove the skin from the sausage and pinch it slightly.

Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth. Put them in a pot, add the olive oil, the chorizo and the laurel leaf and bring them to the fire, letting it saute. Then add the garlic cut into pieces, as well as the tomato drained, and let it saute for a few minutes.
Add enough water for the rice cooking, a pinch of salt and the spicy and let it boil. Add the rice and fish and let cook about 10 minutes.
Acrescente de seguida o aipo e os coentros picados, mexa e retifique os temperos. Sirva de imediato, com mais ervas frescas picadas.
Season the fish with salt and lemon juice. Remove the skin from the sausage and pinch it slightly.

Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth. Put them in a pot, add the olive oil, the chorizo and the laurel leaf and bring them to the fire, letting it saute. Then add the garlic cut into pieces, as well as the tomato drained, and let it saute for a few minutes.
Add enough water for the rice cooking, a pinch of salt and the spicy and let it boil. Add the rice and fish and let cook about 10 minutes.
Acrescente de seguida o aipo e os coentros picados, mexa e retifique os temperos. Sirva de imediato, com mais ervas frescas picadas.

mothers-refrigerator-sweet-argiro.name: Mother's Refrigerator Sweet

ingredients.item: 1 tb liquid vanilla or vanilla capsule
125 gauze for all uses or self-inflated
1 tb liquid vanilla or vanilla capsule
125 gauze for all uses or self-inflated

instructions: Shake the flour with baking powder.
Melt the chocolate and margarine into a ben marie over low heat. We mix regularly.
Allow 5-10′ to cool.
In bowls, add the eggs, sugar, vanilla and salt and beat with a hand mixer for a few minutes to hang and fluffy.
Add the chocolate mixture and mix to integrate.
Add the nuts and amaretto liqueur and fold the mixture.
Add the sifted flour and gently mix the mixture.
Finally, add the pieces of white chocolate.
We put it in a refractory buttered long-tipped vessel.
Bake on the medium grill for 35′-40′, if we have air or under the grill for 40–45′, if we have resistance.
Let it stand for 15 minutes.
Add the liquid chocolate and let it cool completely.

moussaka-without-minced-meat-argiro.name: Moussaka Without Minced Meat

ingredients.item: 4 potatoes cooked or fried (cut into slices)
2 large mature and tight tomatoes (cut into slices)
A little oil for the baking pan
4 potatoes cooked or fried (cut into slices)
2 large mature and tight tomatoes (cut into slices)
A little oil for the baking pan

instructions: For the vegetable moussaka without minced meat, cut the eggplants and pumpkins into slices of 0.5 cm thick.
Place the vegetables in rows in the shallow baking pans of the oven.
Brush them with olive oil, sprinkle them with salt and bake them at 220.3.3. for 15', in a preheated oven to soften.
Cut the mushrooms into slices.
Heat a pan to burn well.
Add some garage oil and sauce for a few minutes the mushrooms on high heat to drink their liquids.
Add salt and pepper.

moussaka-mock-moussaka-argiro.name: Moussaka – Mock Moussaka

ingredients.item: 2 flushed kefalotyr (we hold 3-4 tablespoons for the crust)
A little olive oil for the baking pan
2 flushed kefalotyr (we hold 3-4 tablespoons for the crust)
A little olive oil for the baking pan

instructions: Heat first 4 to 5 tablespoons of the total olive oil and add the minced meat to a strong heat.
Add the onion, garlic and carrot and allow them to soften for a few minutes.
Add the tomato paste and rub the pot for 1 minute.
Add the cognac and let it evaporate completely.
Add the leaves and cinnamon wood, savour for 5 minutes during boiling and then remove them.
Rub pepper in the minced meat and add the tomato chopped and some water just to cover the ingredients.
Cover the pot and simmer for 20 minutes.
In the last 10 minutes of boiling, add the salted vegetables to the minced meat sauce and continue cooking the minced meat.

mrs-welchs-butter-tarts.name: Mrs Welch's Butter Tarts
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place tart shells on a baking sheet; sprinkle raisins and walnuts evenly between shells.
Whisk brown sugar, corn syrup, butter, egg, vanilla extract, and salt together in a bowl; pour mixture evenly over raisins and walnuts into tart shells.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set and crust is golden, about 35 minutes.

mushroom-and-avocado-cream-wrap-lezzet.name: Mushroom And Avocado Cream Wrap

ingredients.item: 1 small pepper ( chopped in the form of minic membrane)

instructions: 1. A delicious combination with mushrooms and avocado creamy;) Add butter after heated in the sauce oil pan.
2. Add sliced mushrooms.
3. Cook 5-6 minutes in medium fire.
4. Add fresh drawn salt, pepper and blind.
5. Take the mushroom water completely from the stove.
6.   Lightly crush the avocadoyu fork, which you remove the feed.
7. Add the grated Ezine cheese and mix a little.
8. Cool bread on the countertop.
9. Spray avocadoted, Ezine cheese cream on it.
10. In advance, sprinkle the mushrooms and dice chopped peppers.
11. 11. Serve without yellowing in roll shape.

mushrooms-with-farinheira-teleculinaria.name: Mushrooms With Farinheira
instructions: Peel the onion and garlic teeth and pick them out. Take your foot off the mushrooms and pinch it too. Remove the skin and undo it.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira com um pouco de azeite, junte a cebola e o alho picados e deixe alourar. Adicione os cogumelos picados e a farinheira, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva.

On a dishboard, have the "hat" of the mushrooms with the opening facing upwards. Fill them with the previous preparation, sprinkle them with grated cheese and put them in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 6 minutes. Remove and serve with chopped parsley.

mustard-sauce-for-corned-beef.name: Mustard Sauce For Corned Beef
instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat; remove from heat.
Whisk brown sugar, white sugar, mustard, egg, salt, and pepper together in a medium bowl. Whisk in vinegar until well combined. Stir mixture into melted butter in the saucepan.
Stir sauce over medium heat until boiling. Reduce heat and simmer for 3 minutes more.
